title: [VMIC-A3] Multi-sink PlaybackService for Speakers, VirtualMic, and Both
scope: PlaybackService route planning and multi-sink fan-out for TTS audio

test_cases.playback_route_speakers_one_sink: pass - Speakers config resolves to one speaker sink target
test_cases.playback_route_virtual_mic_one_sink: pass - VirtualMic config resolves to one virtual mic sink target
test_cases.playback_route_both_fans_out: pass - two mock sinks receive identical payload bytes
test_cases.virtual_sink_failure_is_startup_error: pass - sink factory failure includes virtual device name and root cause

notes: PlaybackRoutePlan maps TtsRouting to concrete sink targets without changing legacy PlaybackService::new behavior.
Rodio sinks are still constructed inside the playback thread so rodio OutputStream ownership remains on the same OS thread.
Both mode starts one rodio sink per target from the same compressed audio bytes and polls all active sinks for completion/interruption.
MockAudioSink fan-out tests are hardware-free and do not require Zoom, Teams, or a real virtual cable.
